_spurious_description: spurious_allowed: hierarchy LEAF codes legitimately absent from the panel (text/admin fields or valid-but-unfiled form lines greyed-out per C4). The bidirectional gate FAILS on any hierarchy leaf code never reported in the panel that is NOT listed here — so genuine parse artifacts must be dropped via *_hierarchy_overrides.json drop_codes, not parked here.
_structure_exclusions_note: Pre-existing Schedule structural debt from the 2026-06-19/20 ?25/?26 RAL/Q/C buildout (depth-vs-item mismatches + cross-part duplicate item numbers). RAL was reconciled to the form 2026-06-22 and is intentionally NOT excluded (must stay clean). The rest are documented known debt scoped for per-schedule PDF reconciliation; the gate blocks any NEW structural regression beyond this list.
